name: ASUS Prime B760-PLUS ATX Motherboard
highlights: Intel ® LGA 1700 Socket: Ready for 13 th and 12 th Gen Intel ® processors
Ultrafast Connectivity: PCIe 5.0, three PCIe 4.0 M.2, Realtek 2.5Gb Ethernet, USB 3.2 Gen 2×2 Type-C ® , front USB 3.2 Gen 1 Type-C ® and Thunderbolt™ (USB4 ® ) header support
Comprehensive Cooling: VRM heatsinks, M.2 heatsink, PCH heatsink, hybrid fan headers and Fan Xpert 2+
Exclusive Memory Technology: ASUS Enhanced Memory Profile II and ASUS OptiMem II
Aura Sync RGB Lighting: Onboard Addressable Gen 2 headers and Aura RGB header for RGB LED strips, easily synced with Aura Sync-capable hardware
description: ASUS Prime B760-PLUS Intel® B760 13th and 12th Gen LGA 1700 ATX Motherboard Price in Pakistan Model Brand ASUS Series Prime Model PRIME B760-PLUS Part Number 90MB1EF0-M0AAY0 Supported CPU CPU Socket Type LGA 1700 CPU Type Intel® Socket LGA1700 for 13th Gen Intel® Core™ & 12th Gen Intel® Core™, Pentium® Gold and Celeron® Processors* Supports Intel® Turbo Boost Technology 2.0 and Intel® Turbo Boost Max Technology 3.0** * Refer to www.asus.com for CPU support list.** Intel® Turbo Boost Max Tech
